name: Miraculous Detective in Jianghu
overview: Wen Tong, a legendary thief, and Gu Jincheng, a law enforcer, join forces to solve a series of mysterious cases, unraveling hidden conspiracies and power struggles within the martial world as they pursue the truth.

trailers.title: 📺《江湖绝色录/Jiang Hu Jue Se Lu 》💋你在剧中看到的温女侠VS实际中的温女侠🥳
